{{ .Params.rating }}
{{ $rating := .Params.rating | default 0 }} {{ range seq 5 }} {{ if le . (int $rating) }} {{ else }} {{ end }} {{ end }}
Based on {{ .Params.reviews }} reviews
S
Sarah M. 2 months ago

Absolutely amazing experience! They captured every special moment perfectly. The photos were delivered quickly and the quality exceeded our expectations. Highly recommend for any wedding!

Google Review
J
James & Emily R. 4 months ago

We couldn't be happier with our wedding photos! The photographer was so professional and made us feel comfortable the entire day. Every detail was captured beautifully. Worth every penny!

Google Review
L
Laura K. 6 months ago

Great photographer with an eye for detail. Very creative and easy to work with. The turnaround time was reasonable and the final images were stunning. Would definitely book again for future events.

Google Review
